summary: Helped Xiaosong debug Admin agent HTTP 401 invalid x-api-key error. Identified it as GitHub Copilot token issue. Also investigated unknown config key 'channels.slack.hooks' - found it was already removed from current config.
lessons: GitHub Copilot API errors show Anthropic-style request IDs because Copilot proxies to Claude
OPENCLAW_HOME env var means 'openclaw doctor' always runs against the current agent, not the target dir - need to change env var or edit config directly
When debugging another agent's config, read their openclaw.json directly rather than trying to run CLI commands which are bound to current agent's env
